name: Paneer Butter Masala
description: Rich, creamy curry with soft paneer cubes in a spiced tomato-cashew gravy. A North Indian classic beloved for its velvety texture and balanced heat.

name: Veg Biryani
description: Aromatic long-grain basmati rice layered with seasonal vegetables, saffron, caramelised onions, and whole spices. Slow-cooked in dum style for a deeply fragrant one-pot meal.

name: Chicken Curry
description: Tender chicken pieces slow-cooked in a deeply spiced onion-tomato masala with earthy coriander and warming whole spices. Pairs perfectly with naan or rice.

name: Vegan Tofu Salad
description: Fresh garden greens topped with golden pan-seared tofu, cherry tomatoes, and a zesty lemon-herb vinaigrette. Light, protein-rich, and ready in minutes.

name: Cheese Garlic Bread
description: Oven-toasted artisan sourdough smothered in roasted garlic herb butter and bubbling mozzarella. An irresistible starter or side that disappears fast.

name: Spicy Chicken Wings
description: Crispy double-fried wings tossed in a house-made sriracha-honey glaze with a hint of smoked paprika. Dangerously addictive with a cooling yoghurt dip.

name: Gluten-Free Margherita Pizza
description: Stone-baked on a crispy gluten-free base with San Marzano tomato sauce, fresh buffalo mozzarella and torn basil. All the flavour, none of the gluten.

name: Vegan Sushi Roll
description: Inside-out roll filled with creamy avocado, crunchy cucumber, and tangy pickled daikon. Served with low-sodium soy sauce and pickled ginger.

name: Grilled Chicken Steak
description: Juicy free-range chicken breast marinated 12 hours in lemon-herb brine, grilled to perfection and served with roasted seasonal vegetables and a cracked peppercorn jus.

name: Mango Protein Smoothie
description: Thick, refreshing blend of Alphonso mango, ripe banana, cold almond milk, and 20g of plant protein. A post-workout or quick breakfast in a glass.

name: Fish and Chips
description: Golden beer-battered cod fillet with thick-cut triple-cooked chips, minted mushy peas, and homemade tartar sauce. A British classic done right.

name: Mushroom Risotto
description: Slow-stirred Arborio rice with a medley of porcini, shiitake, and button mushrooms, white wine, and a generous fold of aged parmesan and truffle oil at the end.

name: Red Lentil Soup
description: Warming bowl of red lentils slow-cooked with carrots, cumin, turmeric, and a final squeeze of lemon. Nourishing, filling, and ready in 20 minutes.

name: Thai Green Curry
description: Fragrant coconut-milk curry with bamboo shoots, Thai basil, baby eggplant, and seasonal vegetables. Authentically spicy with a complex herbal finish.

name: Chocolate Lava Cake
description: Warm 70% dark-chocolate cake with a molten liquid centre that flows when you cut in, served with hand-scraped vanilla bean ice cream and a raspberry coulis.

name: Masala Dosa
description: Thin, fermented rice-lentil crepe filled with spiced potato masala, served with coconut chutney and piping-hot sambar. South India's favourite street breakfast.

name: Idli Sambar
description: Soft, steamed rice-and-lentil cakes paired with a tamarind-spiced vegetable sambar and three chutneys. Light, digestible, and deeply satisfying.

name: Egg Bhurji Roll
description: Fluffy scrambled eggs tossed with onion, tomato, green chilli, and spices, wrapped in a flaky paratha. A street-style breakfast roll packed with flavour.

name: Palak Paneer
description: Creamy pureed spinach gravy with cubes of fresh paneer, tempered with garlic, ginger, and warming spices. A nutrient-dense, comforting vegetarian classic.

name: Mutton Rogan Josh
description: Slow-braised tender mutton in a rich Kashmiri sauce of whole spices, Kashmiri chilli, and yoghurt. A bold, fragrant curry best enjoyed with steamed rice.

name: Prawn Butter Garlic
description: Jumbo prawns sautéed in a generous knob of butter with roasted garlic, white wine, and a finish of fresh parsley. Ready in under 10 minutes — pure luxury.

name: Dal Tadka
description: Yellow toor lentils cooked until silky smooth, finished with a sizzling ghee tadka of cumin, garlic, dried red chilli, and asafoetida. Pure soul food.

name: Quinoa Power Bowl
description: Tri-colour quinoa base loaded with roasted sweet potato, crispy chickpeas, baby kale, sliced avocado, and a tahini-lemon dressing. Fuel for your whole day.

name: Avocado Toast
description: Thick sourdough toast spread with smashed avocado, topped with a squeeze of lemon, chilli flakes, and microgreens. Simple, satisfying, and Instagram-worthy.

name: Açaí Berry Bowl
description: Thick blended açaí base topped with granola, fresh banana slices, strawberry, chia seeds, and a drizzle of raw honey. A vibrant antioxidant-rich breakfast bowl.

name: Chicken Caesar Wrap
description: Grilled chicken strips, crisp romaine, shaved parmesan, and house-made Caesar dressing rolled tight in a warm whole-wheat tortilla. Lunch sorted.

name: Hummus with Warm Pita
description: Silky smooth chickpea hummus drizzled with extra-virgin olive oil and dusted with smoked paprika, served with warm, pillowy pita triangles for dipping.

name: Watermelon Mint Cooler
description: Fresh watermelon blended with lime juice, a handful of mint leaves, and a pinch of black salt. Supremely hydrating and naturally sweet — zero sugar added.

name: Cold Brew Coffee
description: Single-origin coffee steeped cold for 18 hours, yielding a smooth, low-acid concentrate served over ice with optional oat milk. Caffeine that actually lasts.

name: Gulab Jamun
description: Soft, spongy milk-solid dumplings soaked overnight in a fragrant rose and cardamom syrup, served warm with a scoop of kulfi. India's most beloved dessert.
